info.name: Codehause API
info.description: Auth (register/login/refresh/logout/me), client self-service (profile/password/deactivate), admin client management, bundle/feature catalog, client quotations, image uploads (avatar/bundle/feature) via Supabase Storage, and the post-approval Projects/Milestones/Payments lifecycle. Run top-to-bottom within a folder — requests auto-capture tokens/ids into the active environment. Select the "Codehause - Local" environment (postman/codehause.postman_environment.json) before running. NOTE: there is no self-service admin signup — register a user via Auth > Register, then run `UPDATE users SET role='admin' WHERE user_id = <id>` directly against the local MySQL db, then use Admin - Client Management > Admin Login with adminEmail/adminPassword set to that account.

request.description: Run this LAST, only if you want to test catalog deletion — it removes the feature used by earlier requests in this folder.

Fixed bundles must include a price. grandTotal on a quotation for a Fixed bundle equals this flat price only — its linked features (if any) are informational and are NOT separately added to the total.

body.raw:
{
  "bundleName": "Custom Website",
  "description": "Manual quote built from individual features",
  "pricingType": "Manual",
  "isActive": true,
  "featureIds": [{{featureId}}]
}

request.description: Manual bundles must NOT include a price (it's priced by summing whichever linked features are attached). Run Features > Create Feature first so {{featureId}} is set.
As a client token, only active bundles are returned. Swap the bearer token to {{adminAccessToken}} to see inactive ones too.
Re-attaching a feature already linked is idempotent (200, no duplicate row).

Optional: run this to test that clients get 404 on this bundle afterward and that creating a quotation against it returns 409. Run AFTER the Quotations folder if you want the Create Quotation requests to succeed first.
Optional/last step. Existing quotations against this bundle survive with bundle_id set to NULL (verified by QA).
Run Bundles > Create Fixed Bundle first. subtotal/grandTotal should equal exactly the bundle's flat price, discount/tax 0, status Pending.

exec: pm.test('grandTotal equals bundle price only', function () {

item.name: Create Quotation - Fixed Bundle + Extra Feature (Client)

request.description: subtotal should equal bundle price + the extra feature's price.
subtotal should equal the sum of the Manual bundle's linked features (no bundle base price).
Only returns quotations owned by this client, regardless of any clientId filter.
A different client's token gets 404 here, not 403 — ownership is hidden as non-existence.
Approving auto-creates a Project (captured into {{projectId}}) and sets quotations.approvedAt in the same transaction.
Use this on a DIFFERENT (still-Pending) quotationId than the one Approved above, since a quotation can only be finalized once.

Click the 'avatar' field's Select Files button and choose a JPEG/PNG/WebP under 5MB before sending. Uploads to Supabase Storage; response's avatarUrl is a public, unauthenticated URL. Verified working 2026-07-09 with a real 1x1 PNG (confirmed present in storage.objects and publicly fetchable).
Removes the avatar from Supabase Storage and nulls avatarUrl. Safe to call even if no avatar is set (no-op, still 200).
Run Bundles > Create Fixed Bundle first. Click the 'image' field's Select Files button and choose a JPEG/PNG/WebP under 5MB before sending.
Run Features > Create Feature first. Click the 'image' field's Select Files button and choose a JPEG/PNG/WebP under 5MB before sending.
Run Quotations > Approve Quotation first so a project exists.
Sets the project's overallProgress to this absolute value (not additive) — check via Projects > Get Project By Id afterward.
Response includes a computed isOverdue boolean.
amount/requiredProgressPercentage become locked (409) once the milestone status is Paid; title/dueDate remain editable.
409 if any payment references this milestone — only run against a fresh milestone with no payments.
As a client token, only active methods are returned.
Select a JPEG/PNG/WebP under 5MB before sending.
Run this to confirm the method disappears from a client's list/get (404) while admin still sees it.
409 if this method has payment history — only run against a fresh method with no payments, otherwise deactivate instead.
Blocked with 409 if this milestone already has a Pending/Verified payment, or is already Paid.
Select a JPEG/PNG/WebP under 5MB. Required before an admin can Verify (not Reject) this payment.
400 if proof has not been uploaded yet. On success, flips the milestone to Paid — check via Project Milestones > Get Milestone By Id.

Use on a DIFFERENT still-Pending payment than the one Verified above — a payment can only be finalized once. Rejection does NOT mark the milestone Paid, and allows a new payment to be submitted for the same milestone.
